word: G2365 - θυγάτριον - thygátrion - thoo-gat'-ree-on - Little daughter

sections.paragraph:
- Original: θυγάτριον

- Transliteration: Thugatrion

- Phonetic: thoo-gat'-ree-on

- Definition:

1. a little daughter

- Origin: from G2364

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G2364; a daughterling: - little (young) daughter.
